heading: Built on Trust, Driven by Results
para1: Fortress Properties LLC was founded in 2018 with a clear vision: to bring integrity, professionalism, and world-class service to Abu Dhabi's real estate market. Based in Al Farah Tower on Mina Street, we serve clients across the emirate — from first-time buyers to seasoned investors.
para2: Our team of licensed brokers and consultants specialise in residential sales, leasing, and commercial property across Abu Dhabi's most sought-after locations — Yas Island, Saadiyat Island, Al Reem Island, Corniche, and beyond.
mission: To deliver seamless, transparent, and results-driven real estate experiences that exceed client expectations every time.
vision: To be Abu Dhabi's most trusted real estate brokerage — known for integrity, expertise, and genuine client care.
